programmes.show_description: Harry the signalman has fattened up a lovely turkey in time for Christmas, but the turkey seems to have other plans. S1 E2: Talking Turkey
A stormy night in the 1940s has a striking effect on Gary's journey back to the present day, leaving him a completely different person in more ways than one. S6 E1: Mine's a Double
Rowan Atkinson creates more comic mayhem as Mr. Bean comes to the aid of a heart attack victim, fails miserably to post a letter, and flies off on holiday. E6: Mr. Bean Rides Again
After an attempt to stop a prison riot goes badly wrong and one of their own is left behind, the team try everything they can to save their colleague. S3 E6
Beryl and Sandra meet again at a slimming class. When Sandra seeks a tenant, Beryl appears. Reunited, they face old patterns, new scars, and deny middle age with wry humour. S10 E1: Hello Again
A selection of live performances from TV music shows in the 1960s for a genuine taste of the best of the '60s!
Pamela makes changes to the sleeping arrangements in the flat, Brenda returns to Liverpool when things go wrong in London, and Malcolm's mother approves of him spending time with Susan. S3 E1: Losing
Sharon finds that looking after Dorien's every wish is a full-time job - with money tight, Sharon and Tracey take Dorien's designer clothes to a car boot sale to raise funds. S10 E2: Slave
When the hapless bumbler Mr. Bean goes back to school, he scares a boy in the chemistry lab and the nudes in the art class cause him to look at the floor. E11: Back to School, Mr. Bean
Two sinister men arrive at the Pearces' room - they want their bag back and they aren't above throwing David off the balcony if he doesn't disclose its whereabouts. S3 E5: Costa Del Crime

Mabel finds a purse in the street and is rewarded for her honesty, and heartstrings are tugged when the idea of a servants' ball is taken up by Lord Meldrum. S4 E3 Come to the Ball
A rude surprise lies in store when Rigsby is a little over-enthusiastic with advice after a couple of newlyweds move into the house. S4 E1: Hello Young Lovers
Wolfie is on the lookout for any money-making opportunity he can find - when Ken's attention is firmly taken up by pavement art, Citizen Smith may have found his answer. S1 E7: But Is It Art?
Will all run smoothly for the Boswells when Caroline finally goes into labour, S2 E2
The homeless Boswells struggle to park their caravan as Sandra flirts to make Derek jealous, but her scheme works too well and with unexpected results. S9 E5: Somewhere to Live, Somewhere to Love
New station master Cecil Parkin is intent on making an impression at Hatley, but Jack is sure that he's already made an impression on his wife May. S1 E3: The Train Now Standing

When Mildred is away visiting her sister, George attempts to evict the tenants so that he and Jerry can convert the flat into separate units to increase rental income. S3 E6: We Shall Not Be Moved
A road trip is planned for the class, but nothing goes according to plan. S2 E5: Don't Forget the Driver
Alf attempts to power Else's wheelchair with a lawnmower engine. It doesn't go to plan but he does manage to foil a bank robbery. S1 E6

When their van breaks down, Arthur and Ray take a cargo of dodgy videos onto a barge travelling through the glorious waterways of England. S8 E13: The Cruel Canal

Gary goes to stay with Ron and his girlfriend when Yvonne throws him out of the marital home. His edgy behaviour makes Phoebe suspicious that he is seeing another woman. S6 E2: All About Yvonne
Mr. Bean wreaks havoc at Harrods when he goes Christmas shopping, then has trouble stuffing a turkey on Christmas Day. E7: Merry Christmas, Mr. Bean
Having almost finished his report into Gene Hunt and his team, DCI Keats continues to push Alex to find out what really happened to Sam Tyler. S3 E7
Beryl's gin-soaked mum, Mrs Hennessey, arrives, insulting everyone. As chaos reigns, Sandra sneaks off to see Rex, the married love she can't let go of. S10 E2: Mrs Hennessey Comes to Call
A selection of live performances from TV music shows in the 1960s for a genuine taste of the best of the '60s!
Pamela drops a bombshell by admitting that she's in love, and Brenda's horrified when she sees David in a restaurant with another woman. S3 E2: Deceiving
Garth and Marcie aren't getting any 'together time' so it's all change in the bedrooms again - Sharon tries to bed down in the loft, but she makes an unexpected discovery. S10 E3: Hot Stuff
It turns our that Mr. Bean isn't very good at looking after things in a laundrette, and he later has difficulty keeping control of his ball during a round of mini golf. E12: Tee Off, Mr. Bean
When David buys a raffle ticket in aid of Conservative funds, Labour supporter Amy is shocked and accuses him of selling out the socialist principles he embraced when they met. S3 E6: Cause Celebre

When Ralph finally discovers the truth about George and Agatha after sacking Selfridge, he decides on revenge. Will he succeed? S4 E4 The Truth Revealed
There's been a spare bed in Philip's room since Alan moved out, and Rigsby has no intentions of keeping it empty. S4 E2: Fire And Brimstone
In this Christmas episode, Wolfie, Ken and Tucker are struggling for money to buy presents when Ken suggests they turn to a higher power. S1 E8: A Story For Christmas
Joey promises Billy the use of his Jaguar and Jack and Adrian run into trouble with some local thugs when a deal goes wrong. S2 E3
Concerned by Sandra's behaviour during pregnancy, Derek and her mother step in; meanwhile, the Boswells defiantly park their caravan outside the town hall. S9 E6: The Best Things in Life Are Not Free
The station staff are ready to help Cecil move into the station master's house, and May has a confession to make and shares it with Ethel... but will she tell Jack? S1 E4: A Moving Story
When Ralph finally discovers the truth about George and Agatha after sacking Selfridge, he decides on revenge. Will he succeed? S4 E4 The Truth Revealed
Chrissy takes Robin's place at a weekly card game while he is in hospital having his tonsils removed - and claims that a woman can play cards just as well as a man. S3 E7: Three of a Kind
Mr. Brown needs a place to stay for the night while his apartment is getting painted. Giovanni and Max volunteer their flat and decide to host a party for the class. S2 E6: A Hard Day's Night
1985 Christmas special. Alf schemes so they can attend two Christmas dinners. Rita is forced to stay.
